name: Marie Alouette
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing randomly-generated lower-class clothing. Armed with an iron bow and four iron arrows.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: herder, peaceful, simple, victim, quiet, settler
Role: Marie Alouette is a herder living in the small village of Water's Edge. She lives a quiet, simple life in the peaceful settlement before becoming one of the tragic victims of the Blackwood Company's drug-fueled massacre. She carries a small amount of gold and an iron bow for protection.
Home Location Information: Her farmhouse in Water's Edge.
Daily Routine: Marie lives a quiet life, taking a two-hour meal at midday and another at 6pm. The rest of her time is spent relaxing inside her farmhouse. She never sleeps. This peaceful routine ends when she is killed by the Blackwood Company during the Infiltration quest, after which her body is moved to the center of Water's Edge.
Personality - The Quiet Herder: Marie represents the simple, peaceful life of Water's Edge's settlers before tragedy strikes. Her quiet existence and unarmed nature (despite carrying a bow) underscore the innocence of the victims in the Blackwood Company's brutal and senseless attack.
author: Bethesda
